full_text:
Lü Qian (Zike) 呂虔 (子恪)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Qian (呂虔), styledZike (子恪). His recruitment of strong warriors made the areas under his governance some of the mightiest. Lü Qian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
